reviews.review_description:
One of the best horror games I've ever played. It may not look interesting at the front cover but when u start playing ITS SCARY and probably will give u nightmares but other than that when ur playing with ur friends it's more better and funnier try it out and see how it goes :))🥹🙏

For the developer THANK u for making this game! And u know who I'm talking abt. Thank u
I will never forget this game even if it will get shut down but I doubt it.

PLEASE GET THIS GAME AND RATE IT 5!!⭐️❤️‍🩹✨️

reviews.review_title: bro what happened to the game
reviews.review_description: i was a moderator in it the owner gave me moderator now the game became an empty base plate
this game has five star i'm gonna tell my brother  to get that game🤩
